summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for updated Voletron Engenharia Elétrica landing page. All core functionality working correctly including commercial calculator with dual modes, lead form, WhatsApp CTAs, professional language, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Professional headline without '90%' promises - uses technical language
Commercial calculator kWh mode: 500 kWh × R$0.28 (2026) = R$140.00 ✓
Commercial calculator R$ mode: R$650 ÷ 1.30 = 500 kWh, 500 × R$0.28 = R$140.00 ✓
Calculator shows correct consumption estimation, final value, and savings percentage
Lead form with name, phone, bill value fields - all functional and submittable
Lead form redirects to WhatsApp with formatted message
10 WhatsApp CTAs found, all using correct number (5571999192508)
Professional CTA language: 'Falar com Engenheiro', 'Tirar dúvidas com especialista'
Engineer section with compact photos and professional content
New 'Por que escolher engenheiro' section with 4 reason cards
Floating WhatsApp button visible and properly positioned
Mobile responsiveness: menu opens, CTAs visible, layout adapts correctly
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
Professional language throughout without generic promises
